title: viola sandrasea subsp. sandrasea
intro: Viola sandrasea subsp. sandrasea, also known as the Sandrose Violet, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the viola genus. It is native to the mountainous regions of New South Wales and Victoria in Australia. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Viola sandrasea subsp. sandrasea include reducing inflammation and pain, improving respiratory health, and supporting immune function, and it can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for medicinal use.
